meaning: n.厚圆椅垫,附有厚圆椅垫的椅子
examples: Her hair is teased up and pinned back into a pouf.
That's debatable, considering Zhang wore his hair in a cotton candy pouf.
Squeeze onto a wet pouf or washcloth. Work into a rich, creamy lather and rinse.
That led to a job at Yves Saint Laurent and a three-year stint with Christian Lacroix, at the dizzying height of the designer's pouf-dress glory days.
